central_hypothesis: Flower size and multilocus outcrossing can erode continuously as effective outcross service declines, whereas autonomous reproduction changes only after a critical reproductive-assurance threshold is crossed.
excluded_from_current_inference: GBIF-derived complete flora, abundance, occupancy or diversity
automatic public-image embeddings as floral phenotype
causal attribution to Bombus ardens from regime labels alone
simulation_role: Quantify discrimination between a smooth cline and a predeclared second-step threshold, including false threshold selection and recovery. Simulation does not establish that a real threshold exists.
boundary: A no-change model requires a separate penalized or replicated-data analysis and is intentionally outside this three-regime two-shape diagnostic.
